---
title: "Why Leonardo was a saboteur, Gutenberg went broke, and Florence was weird"
author: "Ada Palmer & Dwarkesh Patel"
date: "2026-03-06"
date-added: "2026-03-23"
categories: [history, Renaissance, technology, innovation]
status: to-watch
url: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PAIhVfGbREA"
---

Ada Palmer on the Dwarkesh Podcast: Renaissance Florence, Leonardo, Gutenberg, and what historical innovation actually looked like.

[Watch →](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PAIhVfGbREA)
